bead.title: Migrate claude-related tests to interface mocks and fixture cache files
bead.description:
Source manifest: .ddx/beads-harness-interface-refactor.yaml
Source bead ID: BEAD-HARNESS-IF-05F
Governing plan: docs/helix/02-design/plan-2026-05-14-harness-interface-refactor.md

See the manifest and the plan for full context, touch-point inventory, and sub-sequence ordering.
bead.acceptance:
1. service_status_test.go, service_subscription_quota_test.go, service_routing_errors_test.go, service_providers_test.go, service_routing_test.go, harness_golden_integration_test.go no longer reference claudeharness exports beyond the dispatcher constructor
2. internal/harnesses/claude/*_test.go files run as package claude (white-box) where they need unexported helpers
3. go test ./... passes; runtime budget maintained

events.body: {"decision":"warn","decision_source":"pre_claim_intake","detail":"the bead should be small enough for one bounded implementation attempt.: The target outcome is understandable and the dependency is explicit, but the bead is oversized under this repo's own sizing rule: the acceptance criteria name six specific test files plus a package-wide internal test conversion and a suite-wide runtime assertion. That bundles multiple distinct work streams into one attempt, so the safer intake result is split-before-claim rather than dispatch as written.","fingerprint":"4a4c61c4c495026c402b5fc3d74cf2535cc4223730d9e55d287891592f499c0c","policy_mode":"warn-only","reason":"readiness_best_effort","rule_id":"pre_claim_intake.readiness_best_effort","suggested_action":"revise the rewrite so it preserves every explicit commitment"}
